TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_laluma'an_nu_Stak, title = laluma'an_nu_Stak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/laluma'an_nu_Stak} }

S.FORM: laluma'an nu Stak i Kasi'nawan (Amilika: House of Stark of Witerfell) u nisangaan ku dadiw nu sulda atu lamal nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u caay katenga a laluma'an. u sasatuasay a laluma'an i aamisan ku laluma'an nu Stak, u kasahenulan a laluma'an i aamisan ku heni; u mikeliday i aamisan ku laluma'an nu Stak aca. i nu saayaway nu cudad, u Ed Stak ku sakakaay a mikeliday, u idaway tu Kasi'nawan aca, u midiputay tu nu aamisan aca. u kulit nu laluma'an nu Stak hananay, u maduba'ay i sulsuldaay a lala' a Wolf ; u kamu nu laluma'an: amakatukuk tu i kasi'nawan. (Amilika a kamu: Winter is coming.) laylay nu laluma'an nu Stak u malingatuway ci Planden ku patizengay nu laluma'an nu Stak, u cacayay nu sibutulay a kungku hananay. i daw (izaw) ku cacay a kungku tu cinidaan (cinizaan) hananay, napatizeng(napatideng) ci nida atu Alikakay tu talakaway a lilin tu mitena' tu sanlengacay culilay a kukung. namakay u patizengay ci Pulanden hananay, u kakaay a mikeliday ku laluma'an nu Stak i dikuday a malebu' a mihcan i aamisan. namalaala tu namadademecay ci Tolen Stak namadademec tu Ekon, malamisimaway tu aamisan tu llaluma'an nu Stak sananay. micidekay atu lalangawan u micidekay nu laluma'an nu Stak, i tanayaay a bihid, abuabuwan a mata, talakaway a udip; zayhan, u maedapan nu saayaway a tademaw tu patizanan nu talakaway a lilin sa, mitena' tu sanlengacay culilay a kukung, atu nicuwaay nu aamisan, sisa malakasahenulay a paayawwayay nu pisimaway tu labii a hitay ku laluma'an nu Stak. ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Stak Ed (Amilika a kamu: Edard Stark) Katelin Taly Lab Sansa Alya manamuh ci nida tahekal misaculiculil midang, caay kahida u kakana nida ci Sansa, tada' u madimelay a tatayna ci Sansa, sademiad sa minaman tu mala tatenga'ay a kumceday a limecedam cinida. maydih ci Alya minanam mala hitay, mi kuning tu balucu' ngay icelang mipacuk tu ada, mala tatenga'ay a hitay. laylay u sakatulu a wawa nu mikeliday nu Kasienawan ci Edad aci Katelin, u sasabaay a wawana nu hehi, izaw (idaw) ku tatulu a kaka nida, u kakaay ci Lab, u saba ci Plan aci Licon, izaw (idaw) aca ku cacayya a kakana ci Sansa, izaw(idaw) aca ku cacay a kaka nu caay kalecad a ina ci Cyan Snu. makayi ci Alya mala a silalangawan a limecedam, matalaw ci nida malacawa tu cacay a tau a caay katinengay. caay kanamuh nida ninaman tu mudadiw, musalukyaw, atu mitenun hananay, manamuh nida minanam tu mipana', mipacin, midiput tu laluma'an. Bulan Cyan Sno Cyan Sno (Amilika a kamu: Jon Snow) u wawa ni Leyka Takelian aci Liana Stak, u cacay tada a wawa nu heni. i nunisulitan a cudad, i nu saayaway sa, u pucud a wawa ni Etad Stak aci Katelin Stak hananay. u masakapahay i "u dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hananay. mabalaki nida ci Cyan Sno atu calekaka nida (niza)(wawa ni Etad Stakaci aci Katelin Stak). malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľť¶¨šłĀŚÄčšļļÁ∂≤Áęô
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak i kasi Ē~ °nawan (amir~…ĺika: ńßous…ô of stark of wit…ôrf…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ) u nisaŇčaan ku dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶aaj kat…ôŇča a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. u sasatuasaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i aamisan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, u kasańß…ônur~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i aamisan ku ńß…ôni; u mik…ôr~…ĺidaj i aamisan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak a ¶a. i nu saajawaj nu ¶udad, u …ôd stak ku sakakaaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj, u idawaj tu kasi Ē~ °nawan a ¶a, u midiputaj tu nu aamisan a ¶a. u kur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak ńßananaj, u maduba Ē~ °aj i sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a wor~…ĺf ; u kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an: amakatukuk tu i kasi Ē~ °nawan. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: wint…ôr is ¶omiŇč.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak u mar~…ĺiŇčatuwaj ¶i pr~…ĺand…ôn ku patiz…ôŇčaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, u ¶a ¶ajaj nu sibutur~…ĺaj a kuŇčku ńßananaj. i daw (izaw) ku ¶a ¶aj a kuŇčku tu ¶inidaan ( ¶inizaan) ńßananaj, napatiz…ôŇč(napatid…ôŇč) ¶i nida atu ar~…ĺikakaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin tu mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu sanr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kukuŇč. namakaj u patiz…ôŇčaj ¶i pur~…ĺand…ôn ńßananaj, u kakaaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak i dikudaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbu Ē~ ° a mińß ¶an i aamisan. namar~…ĺaar~…ĺa tu namadad…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i tor~…ĺ…ôn stak namadad…ôm…ô ¶ tu …ôkon, mar~…ĺamisimawaj tu aamisan tu r~…ĺr~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak sananaj. mi ¶id…ôkaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, i tanajaaj a bińßid, abuabuwan a mata, tar~…ĺakawaj a udip; zajńßan, u ma…ôdapan nu saajawaj a tad…ômaw tu patizanan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin sa, mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu sanr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kukuŇč, atu ni ¶uwaaj nu aamisan, sisa mar~…ĺakasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a paajawwajaj nu pisimawaj tu r~…ĺabii a ńßitaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak. ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak …ôd (amir~…ĺika a kamu: …ôdard stark) kat…ôr~…ĺin tar~…ĺj r~…ĺab sansa ar~…ĺja manamuńß ¶i nida tańß…ôkar~…ĺ misa ¶ur~…ĺi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ midaŇč, ¶aaj kańßida u kakana nida ¶i sansa, tada Ē~ ° u madim…ôr~…ĺaj a tatajna ¶i sansa, sad…ômiad sa minaman tu mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a kum ¶…ôdaj a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdam ¶inida. majdińß ¶i ar~…ĺja minanam mar~…ĺa ńßitaj, mi kuniŇč tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° Ňčaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mipa ¶uk tu ada, mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a ńßitaj. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u sakatur~…ĺu a wawa nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu kasi…ônawan ¶i …ôdad a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin, u sasabaaj a wawana nu ńß…ôńßi, izaw (idaw) ku tatur~…ĺu a kaka nida, u kakaaj ¶i r~…ĺab, u saba ¶i pr~…ĺan a ¶i r~…ĺi ¶on, izaw (idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶ajja a kakana ¶i sansa, izaw(idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶aj a kaka nu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a ina ¶i ¶jan snu. makaji ¶i ar~…ĺja mar~…ĺa a sir~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdam, matar~…ĺaw ¶i nida mar~…ĺa ¶awa tu ¶a ¶aj a tau a ¶aaj katin…ôŇčaj. ¶aaj kanamuńß nida ninaman tu mudadiw, musar~…ĺukjaw, atu mit…ônun ńßananaj, manamuńß nida minanam tu mipana Ē~ °, mipa ¶in, midiput tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. bur~…ĺan ¶jan sno ¶jan sno (amir~…ĺika a kamu: *on snow) u wawa ni r~…ĺ…ôka tak…ôr~…ĺian a ¶i r~…ĺiana stak, u ¶a ¶aj tada a wawa nu ńß…ôni. i nunisur~…ĺitan a ¶udad, i nu saajawaj sa, u pu ¶ud a wawa ni …ôtad stak a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin stak ńßananaj. u masakapańßaj i "u dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ" ja tir~…ĺibi a kuŇčku ńßananaj. mabar~…ĺaki nida ¶i ¶jan sno atu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkaka nida (niza)(wawa ni …ôtad staka ¶i a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin stak). mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ********
S.FORM: laluma'an nu Stak i Kasi'nawan (Amilika: House of Stark of Witerfell) u nisangaan ku dadiw nu sulda atu lamal nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u caay katenga a laluma'an. u sasatuasay a laluma'an i aamisan ku laluma'an nu Stak, u kasahenulan a laluma'an i aamisan ku heni; u mikeliday i aamisan ku laluma'an nu Stak aca. i nu saayaway nu cudad, u Ed Stak ku sakakaay a mikeliday, u idaway tu Kasi'nawan aca, u midiputay tu nu aamisan aca. u kulit nu laluma'an nu Stak hananay, u maduba'ay i sulsuldaay a lala' a Wolf ; u kamu nu laluma'an: amakatukuk tu i kasi'nawan. (Amilika a kamu: Winter is coming.) laylay nu laluma'an nu Stak u malingatuway ci Planden ku patizengay nu laluma'an nu Stak, u cacayay nu sibutulay a kungku hananay. i daw (izaw) ku cacay a kungku tu cinidaan (cinizaan) hananay, napatizeng(napatideng) ci nida atu Alikakay tu talakaway a lilin tu mitena' tu sanlengacay culilay a kukung. namakay u patizengay ci Pulanden hananay, u kakaay a mikeliday ku laluma'an nu Stak i dikuday a malebu' a mihcan i aamisan. namalaala tu namadademecay ci Tolen Stak namadademec tu Ekon, malamisimaway tu aamisan tu llaluma'an nu Stak sananay. micidekay atu lalangawan u micidekay nu laluma'an nu Stak, i tanayaay a bihid, abuabuwan a mata, talakaway a udip; zayhan, u maedapan nu saayaway a tademaw tu patizanan nu talakaway a lilin sa, mitena' tu sanlengacay culilay a kukung, atu nicuwaay nu aamisan, sisa malakasahenulay a paayawwayay nu pisimaway tu labii a hitay ku laluma'an nu Stak. ayda a kasahenulay a tademaw tu laluma'an nu Stak Ed (Amilika a kamu: Edard Stark) Katelin Taly Lab Sansa Alya manamuh ci nida tahekal misaculiculil midang, caay kahida u kakana nida ci Sansa, tada' u madimelay a tatayna ci Sansa, sademiad sa minaman tu mala tatenga'ay a kumceday a limecedam cinida. maydih ci Alya minanam mala hitay, mi kuning tu balucu' ngay icelang mipacuk tu ada, mala tatenga'ay a hitay. laylay u sakatulu a wawa nu mikeliday nu Kasienawan ci Edad aci Katelin, u sasabaay a wawana nu hehi, izaw (idaw) ku tatulu a kaka nida, u kakaay ci Lab, u saba ci Plan aci Licon, izaw (idaw) aca ku cacayya a kakana ci Sansa, izaw(idaw) aca ku cacay a kaka nu caay kalecad a ina ci Cyan Snu. makayi ci Alya mala a silalangawan a limecedam, matalaw ci nida malacawa tu cacay a tau a caay katinengay. caay kanamuh nida ninaman tu mudadiw, musalukyaw, atu mitenun hananay, manamuh nida minanam tu mipana', mipacin, midiput tu laluma'an. Bulan Cyan Sno Cyan Sno (Amilika a kamu: Jon Snow) u wawa ni Leyka Takelian aci Liana Stak, u cacay tada a wawa nu heni. i nunisulitan a cudad, i nu saayaway sa, u pucud a wawa ni Etad Stak aci Katelin Stak hananay. u masakapahay i "u dadiw nu Sulda atu lamal" ya tilibi a kungku hananay. mabalaki nida ci Cyan Sno atu calekaka nida (niza)(wawa ni Etad Stakaci aci Katelin Stak). malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľť¶¨šłĀŚÄčšļļÁ∂≤Áęô
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak i kasi Ē~ °nawan (amir~…ĺika: ńßous…ô of stark of wit…ôrf…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ) u nisaŇčaan ku dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶aaj kat…ôŇča a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. u sasatuasaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i aamisan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, u kasańß…ônur~…ĺan a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i aamisan ku ńß…ôni; u mik…ôr~…ĺidaj i aamisan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak a ¶a. i nu saajawaj nu ¶udad, u …ôd stak ku sakakaaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj, u idawaj tu kasi Ē~ °nawan a ¶a, u midiputaj tu nu aamisan a ¶a. u kur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak ńßananaj, u maduba Ē~ °aj i sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a wor~…ĺf ; u kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an: amakatukuk tu i kasi Ē~ °nawan. (amir~…ĺika a kamu: wint…ôr is ¶omiŇč.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak u mar~…ĺiŇčatuwaj ¶i pr~…ĺand…ôn ku patiz…ôŇčaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, u ¶a ¶ajaj nu sibutur~…ĺaj a kuŇčku ńßananaj. i daw (izaw) ku ¶a ¶aj a kuŇčku tu ¶inidaan ( ¶inizaan) ńßananaj, napatiz…ôŇč(napatid…ôŇč) ¶i nida atu ar~…ĺikakaj tu tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin tu mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu sanr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kukuŇč. namakaj u patiz…ôŇčaj ¶i pur~…ĺand…ôn ńßananaj, u kakaaj a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak i dikudaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbu Ē~ ° a mińß ¶an i aamisan. namar~…ĺaar~…ĺa tu namadad…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i tor~…ĺ…ôn stak namadad…ôm…ô ¶ tu …ôkon, mar~…ĺamisimawaj tu aamisan tu r~…ĺr~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak sananaj. mi ¶id…ôkaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak, i tanajaaj a bińßid, abuabuwan a mata, tar~…ĺakawaj a udip; zajńßan, u ma…ôdapan nu saajawaj a tad…ômaw tu patizanan nu tar~…ĺakawaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin sa, mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu sanr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kukuŇč, atu ni ¶uwaaj nu aamisan, sisa mar~…ĺakasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a paajawwajaj nu pisimawaj tu r~…ĺabii a ńßitaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak. ajda a kasańß…ônur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu stak …ôd (amir~…ĺika a kamu: …ôdard stark) kat…ôr~…ĺin tar~…ĺj r~…ĺab sansa ar~…ĺja manamuńß ¶i nida tańß…ôkar~…ĺ misa ¶ur~…ĺi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ midaŇč, ¶aaj kańßida u kakana nida ¶i sansa, tada Ē~ ° u madim…ôr~…ĺaj a tatajna ¶i sansa, sad…ômiad sa minaman tu mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a kum ¶…ôdaj a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdam ¶inida. majdińß ¶i ar~…ĺja minanam mar~…ĺa ńßitaj, mi kuniŇč tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° Ňčaj i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mipa ¶uk tu ada, mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a ńßitaj. r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u sakatur~…ĺu a wawa nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu kasi…ônawan ¶i …ôdad a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin, u sasabaaj a wawana nu ńß…ôńßi, izaw (idaw) ku tatur~…ĺu a kaka nida, u kakaaj ¶i r~…ĺab, u saba ¶i pr~…ĺan a ¶i r~…ĺi ¶on, izaw (idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶ajja a kakana ¶i sansa, izaw(idaw) a ¶a ku ¶a ¶aj a kaka nu ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a ina ¶i ¶jan snu. makaji ¶i ar~…ĺja mar~…ĺa a sir~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdam, matar~…ĺaw ¶i nida mar~…ĺa ¶awa tu ¶a ¶aj a tau a ¶aaj katin…ôŇčaj. ¶aaj kanamuńß nida ninaman tu mudadiw, musar~…ĺukjaw, atu mit…ônun ńßananaj, manamuńß nida minanam tu mipana Ē~ °, mipa ¶in, midiput tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. bur~…ĺan ¶jan sno ¶jan sno (amir~…ĺika a kamu: *on snow) u wawa ni r~…ĺ…ôka tak…ôr~…ĺian a ¶i r~…ĺiana stak, u ¶a ¶aj tada a wawa nu ńß…ôni. i nunisur~…ĺitan a ¶udad, i nu saajawaj sa, u pu ¶ud a wawa ni …ôtad stak a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin stak ńßananaj. u masakapańßaj i "u dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ" ja tir~…ĺibi a kuŇčku ńßananaj. mabar~…ĺaki nida ¶i ¶jan sno atu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkaka nida (niza)(wawa ni …ôtad staka ¶i a ¶i kat…ôr~…ĺin stak). mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ********
